metadata.description: Deployment name prefix (used for resource naming)
Existing Resource Group name (if useExistingResourceGroup is true)
Number of session hosts to deploy
Local admin username for session hosts
Local admin password for session hosts
AD domain to join (required if joinType = ActiveDirectory)
Azure AD Group Object IDs for AVD users
FSLogix profile share quota in GB
Deploy Scaling Plan for automatic session host power management
Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID for AVD diagnostics
Host Pool type: Pooled or Personal
Load balancer type for Pooled host pool
Max session limit per session host (Pooled only)
Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID for diagnostics
Application Group type: Desktop or RemoteApp
Azure AD Group Object IDs to assign Users role
Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID for diagnostics
Application Group IDs to associate with this workspace
Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID for diagnostics
Name prefix for session hosts (e.g. avd-host)
Number of session hosts to deploy
Domain to join (leave empty for Azure AD join)
Domain join UPN (required if domainToJoin is set)
Domain join password (required if domainToJoin is set)
Enable Intune enrollment (Azure AD join only)
Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID for AMA

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), padLeft(add(range(0, parameters('count'))[range(0, parameters('count'))[copyIndex()]], 1), 2, '0')), 'DSC')]
dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), padLeft(add(range(0, parameters('count'))[range(0, parameters('count'))[range(0, parameters('count'))[copyIndex()]]], 1), 2, '0')), 'AADLoginForWindows')]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), padLeft(add(range(0, parameters('count'))[range(0, parameters('count'))[range(0, parameters('count'))[copyIndex()]]], 1), 2, '0')), 'JsonADDomainExtension')]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), padLeft(add(range(0, parameters('count'))[range(0, parameters('count'))[copyIndex()]], 1), 2, '0')), 'AzureMonitorWindowsAgent')]
dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('namePrefix'), padLeft(add(range(0, parameters('count'))[range(0, parameters('count'))[range(0, parameters('count'))[copyIndex()]]], 1), 2, '0')), 'DSC')]

metadata.description: Storage Account name for FSLogix profiles (must be globally unique)
Azure Files share name for FSLogix profiles
Azure Files share quota in GB
Azure AD Group Object IDs to assign Storage File Data SMB Share Contributor
Subnet Resource ID for Private Endpoint (required if enablePrivateEndpoint is true)
Host Pool Resource ID to associate scaling plan with
Timezone for schedule (e.g. W. Europe Standard Time)

schedules.name: Weekdays
schedules.rampDownNotificationMessage: La sessione verrà terminata tra 30 minuti. Salva il tuo lavoro.
